scripts.setup: bash --noprofile --norc -c 'set -euo pipefail; cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)"; if [ -e package-lock.json ] || [ -e npm-shrinkwrap.json ]; then echo "Daedalus uses bun.lock; remove stale npm lockfile before setup" >&2; exit 1; fi; export BUN_INSTALL="${BUN_INSTALL:-$HOME/.bun}"; BUN_BIN="$BUN_INSTALL/bin/bun"; if [ ! -x "$BUN_BIN" ]; then BUN_BIN="$(command -v bun)"; fi; export SHELL=/bin/bash; export ZDOTDIR="${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/daedalus-empty-zdotdir"; mkdir -p "$ZDOTDIR"; export PATH="$BUN_INSTALL/bin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin"; "$BUN_BIN" install --frozen-lockfile'
